data.name: King's Amusements
data.detailed_description:
Life as a king isn't easy, especially when your elderly mom is forcing you to get married!

A visual novel, with a focus on the relationships between characters, important choices and with consequences, in every decision!

  • More than 150 images with beautiful girls in anime style

  • 3 girls to keep you company in this difficult world

  • Many endings depending only on your choice! Will you be able to find your soulmate and not ruin the kingdom?

You are a king who has ruled the kingdom for many years. Even so, your mother is unhappy with your actions. She demands that you find a wife immediately. Thoughts of marriage have not crossed the king's mind before, but now there is no other choice. Besides, the kingdom requires constant action on your part. Time is not as much as it may seem at first glance.

In the search for your future spouse you will be assisted by two girls: Maria and Diana. But... Can you call it help?

Maria

Strict and judicious. She's always been the king's right hand. Perfectly understands the structure of the kingdom and the workings of all processes. Maria will try to protect the king from unwanted attention, trying to approach the search for a bride from a more scientific point of view.

Diana

Windy and fun. She doesn't like doing paperwork, but it's much more interesting to learn things directly. She communicates with the townspeople and keeps in touch with the king and his subjects. She would prefer a more practical way of finding a bride.

Anna

A member of high society. A possible candidate for the king's wife. Good at her job, keeps her father's business running. A few dates with her could be quite entertaining.

data.short_description: Will you be able to find your soulmate and not ruin the kingdom? Over 150 images and 3 girls are already waiting for you!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
